rationale.R1.1: The agent identifies the core concept of length bias and reframes it effectively, showing where the draft drifted.
rationale.R1.4: Names specific benchmarks but doesn't map against multiple prior works, only articulates delta for one.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for a couple of claims but not comprehensively for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with minor drift in discussing implementation details.
rationale.RX.4: Identifies harmful patterns without introducing new errors or regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but not all minor edits.
